name: Surepass
description: Indian KYC API provider for Aadhaar, PAN, GSTIN, bank account and business verification APIs.

seo.title: Surepass — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Surepass: Indian KYC API provider for Aadhaar, PAN, GSTIN, bank account and business verification APIs.

when_to_use: Aadhaar OTP KYC API for Indian digital onboarding flows
PAN card verification for income tax and fintech KYC
GSTIN business verification for B2B platform onboarding
Bank account verification via penny drop for payout KYC
Driving licence check for telecom and lending verification

pros: Wide coverage of Indian identity APIs
Aadhaar, PAN, GSTIN and bank verification bundled
Competitive pricing in the Indian market
cons: Heavy competition with Signzy, Gridlines, IDfy
Regulatory changes force frequent SDK updates
Enterprise compliance story weaker than Signzy
review.verdict: Pragmatic Indian KYC aggregator API; compare closely with Gridlines and Signzy on price and uptime.
review.best_for: Indian fintechs and startups wanting affordable access to Aadhaar, PAN and GSTIN verification APIs
review.not_for: Teams building outside India or needing enterprise-grade compliance with stricter audit trails

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
